name: Resend
description: Monitor Resend email infrastructure for domain authentication and TLS compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Resend at https://resend.com
2. Go to API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Resend Dashboard → API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
